Lumpia is not only Chinese. The Filipino fried eggrolls are
always called Lumpia. It may have originated in China but
the meaning of the word has evolved in time and geography.
If you ask any non-Chinese person, the lumpia that they are
always talking about is the filipino kind, which is fried.
